Chronology of every recorded fact about [[King]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — The men Simon encountered were acting on orders from the King.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The King would want to hear the news Kai has.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — The King is being distracted by Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The King is dead.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — The King has the ability to seal Dragon's Fangs in the Vault.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The King is an entity that must not meet the Killer.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The King is prophesied to rise from the ashes of the Killer.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The King promised to make Sophara's body and spirit anew if she won.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The King is aiding Dross.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The King possesses madra that allows him to hide from anyone.}}

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The King is an unborn, inactive Iron King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The King is taller than any human man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The King's body contains panels that reveal guns.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
